scenario: Redmine work session - audit the Issue contract before a teardown rework

steps.name: Map the Issue contract and what it is built on
Trace how an issue and its attached data are handled on change
Audit every dependent of the Issue contract
Trace how issue identity and visibility are guarded
Assess the blast radius of the contract change

misses.detail: pre-MCP bypasses: 0, post-MCP verification reads: 86, post-MCP misses: 11 (diagnostic only — grep_count drives fluency)
